purpose: Renders search results returned by SearchPanel. Each file is a FileGroup with collapsible header (chevron + file icon + filename + dirPath + match count). Match rows show line number + MatchHighlight component which slices the matched range out of the full line content and wraps it in <mark> tags. defaultExpanded={results.length <= 20} — auto-expand when ≤20 files, otherwise collapse to keep the list scannable. Click on a match row calls onResultClick(file, line, column). Loading/error/empty/no-result states all return distinct UI fragments. truncated flag adds '(truncated)' to summary.

exports.name: SearchResults
exports.signature: { results, loading, totalMatches, truncated, onResultClick, error }

gotchas: MatchHighlight strips leading whitespace (`before.replace(/^\s+/, '')`) — visually compacted, but if all of `before` is whitespace AND trimmed is empty, the JSX renders empty string (the ternary `trimCount > 0 && trimmed.length === 0 ? '' : trimmed` is intentional but obscure).
FileGroup's expanded state is LOCAL — collapsing/expanding does NOT persist across re-renders triggered by new searches. A new query resets all groups to defaultExpanded.
defaultExpanded threshold is hardcoded at 20 — searches with 21+ files all start collapsed.
Match key `match.line + '-' + match.column + '-' + i` — multiple matches on same line+column would still be distinct via index.
No virtualization — large result sets (>1000 matches across many files) will render slowly.
patterns: Stateless presentational component — receives all data via props.
Inline <mark> for highlighting — picks up CSS via .ide-search-match-highlight class.
fileResult.relativePath optional — falls back to fileResult.file when missing.
